name: Cherokee Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces condensed cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in the oil over high heat.
2. Add chopped onions and reduce heat to medium; cook until tender.
3. Stir in salt, pepper, garlic powder, thyme, oregano, bay leaf, crushed tomatoes, mushroom soup, and rice.
4. Bring all ingredients to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Discard the bay leaf.
6. Spoon into a 1-quart casserole dish.
7. Sprinkle cheese over top of the casserole.
8. Broil just until the cheese melts.
